summary: The remote ChatGPT image service generated the image but failed during the download stage. The browser worker reached the image generation stage (generatedVisibleMs=41996ms) but the download locator timed out waiting for the dialog element to appear. This is a transient infrastructure issue on the remote service side.

outputs.failure_reason: locator.waitFor: Timeout 10000ms exceeded - waiting for locator('[role="dialog"]').last() to be visible

guidance: The image was successfully generated by ChatGPT (the prompt was submitted, the send button was clicked, and the generated image appeared). The failure is at the download step — the browser dialog that normally appears after generation didn't appear within 10s. This could be a transient issue (retry) or a change in the ChatGPT UI. To recover: 1) Retry the same prompt — the service may work on the next attempt. 2) Check if the remote service needs a browser refresh or login at https://chatgpt-vnc.vyibc.com/vnc.html. 3) If this persists, the download locator strategy in the worker may need updating for ChatGPT UI changes.
